ELPAC Level 4
NWEA 1000–1300L
DTR  |  Listen to a Short Exchange
LSE-HS12-L4-10001300-HSELA1112-SPK-LAT-01 • HS English/ELA: Grades 11-12 • Analyze Multiple Interpretations of a Story, Drama, or Poem

Each Version Is Real

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher’s lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Develop a complete explanation: state the rule the teacher named, explain the range of versions she used to illustrate it, and describe why a single example cannot stand in for the whole lesson.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RL.11-12.7  |  HS English/ELA Grades 11-12: Multiple Interpretations of a Text
